_comment: This is a REFERENCE EXAMPLE only — not a real license.
The actual .portpane file is this JSON, base64-encoded, with a real RSA signature.
Generate real licenses with: tools/New-License.ps1 or the generate-license workflow.
FIELD REFERENCE
app         : Always 'portpane'. Key is rejected if this doesn't match.
type        : 'personal', 'club', or 'emcomm'
licensee    : Display name shown in About dialog and window title (club/emcomm)
email       : Licensee contact email — stored in signed payload, never displayed
issued      : UTC timestamp when the key was generated (ISO 8601)
expires     : UTC expiry date (ISO 8601), or the literal string 'never'
version_max : Optional. Last app major.minor this key is valid for.
Omit for permanent access across all versions.
'through 0.6' means valid for 0.6.x; invalid at 0.7.0+.
Pre-release suffixes stripped before comparison:
'0.6.0-beta' → '0.6.0' → within ceiling '0.6' → valid
'0.7.0-beta' → '0.7.0' → exceeds ceiling '0.6' → invalid
signature   : Base64 RSA-SHA256-PKCS1 signature of the signable payload.
Payload format (pipe-delimited, exact JSON string values):
portpane|{type}|{licensee}|{email}|{issued}|{expires}|{version_max}
version_max is '' (empty string) in payload when omitted from JSON.
